home.searchPlaceholder: Search any service — Netflix, Adobe, Spotify...
home.darkPatternDesc: Adobe, Amazon Prime, and Noom are the hardest to cancel — by design.
home.waitlistDesc: We're adding guides for 100+ more services. Leave your email and we'll notify you when we publish guides for the services you care about.

guide.allDoneDesc: Check your email for a confirmation from the service.

search.notFound: No guide found for "{query}" — more coming soon.

footer.tagline: Free cancellation guides for every subscription. Steps verified by real humans.

about.metaTitle: About CancelHub — Free Subscription Cancellation Guides
about.metaDesc: CancelHub provides free, step-by-step guides to cancel any subscription. No ads, no fluff.
about.title: About CancelHub
about.intro: CancelHub is a free resource that helps you cancel subscriptions without the headaches — no dark patterns, no upsells, just clear steps.
about.missionBody: Subscription services make cancellation intentionally difficult. We document every trick they use and give you the exact steps to get out — on every platform.
about.howBody: Every guide is researched and verified by going through the actual cancellation flow. We check each guide regularly and update it when services change their process.
about.freeBody: CancelHub is and will always be free. We don't take money from subscription companies, don't run ads, and don't have referral deals. Our only goal is to help you cancel.
about.contactBody: Found a guide that's out of date, or want to suggest a new service?

contact.metaDesc: Get in touch with CancelHub — report outdated steps, suggest a new guide, or just say hello.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We're a small team. We read every message and usually reply within 24 hours.
contact.emailDesc: Questions, feedback, or anything else — drop us a line.
contact.reportDesc: If a cancellation flow has changed and our guide is out of date, let us know and we'll fix it fast.
contact.suggestDesc: Missing a service? Tell us which subscription you'd like a guide for.
contact.responseNote: We typically respond within 1 business day.
